ignore.reason: Missing close quote is appropriate because the same speaker continues in the next paragraph.
Missing close quote is appropriate because the same speaker continues in the next paragraph.
Missing close quote is appropriate because the same speaker continues in the next paragraph.
Missing close quote is appropriate because the same speaker continues in the next paragraph.
Not allowed to put the period w/in the book title.
Not allowed to put the period w/in the music title.
“Prince of Peace” is an example of protest quotes, not dialog.
